node_types.description: Stack two videos vertically (top and bottom)
Play one video on top with a static bottom image, then switch to a second video on bottom with a static top image.

inputs.description: Video shown in the first segment
inputs.name: video_first

inputs.description: Video shown in the second segment
inputs.name: video_second

inputs.description: Optional static image shown on top during the second segment. Defaults to the fifteenth frame from the end of the first video, or the last frame if the video is shorter.
inputs.name: image_top

inputs.description: Optional static image shown on bottom during the first segment. Defaults to the fifteenth frame of the second video, or the last frame if the video is shorter.
inputs.name: image_bottom

params.description: Width of each pane in pixels
params.name: pane_width

params.description: Height of each pane in pixels
params.name: pane_height

params.description: Pad color used when media aspect ratios do not match the pane size
params.name: background_color

params.name: vmaf_min_score

params.description: Overlap ratio used to dedupe refined results

params.name: loop_if_shorter

node_types.description: Find and trim video segments by natural language prompt

outputs.description: Matched video clip, montage, or original video
outputs.name: output

params.description: Whisper model used when ASR scoring is enabled
params.name: whisper_model

params.description: How to handle no matched segment
params.name: no_match_policy

node_types.description: Input source referencing an uploaded asset
Transcribe spoken audio from a media input into an SRT subtitle file

params.description: Optional language hint such as en or zh
params.name: language

params.description: Merge adjacent short subtitle segments to make downstream translation/TTS smoother
params.name: merge_adjacent

params.description: Maximum silence gap allowed when merging neighboring subtitle cues
params.name: merge_max_gap_seconds

params.description: Treat subtitle cues shorter than this as merge candidates
params.name: merge_min_chars

params.description: Treat subtitle cues shorter than this duration as merge candidates
params.name: merge_min_duration_seconds

params.description: Never merge subtitle cues into a segment longer than this duration
params.name: merge_max_duration_seconds

node_types.description: Burn subtitles into a video
Generate a timed speech track from subtitle cues using the configured TTS service

inputs.description: Optional transcript/subtitle file matching the reference voice audio
inputs.name: ref_text

params.description: Merge nearby subtitle cues into one speech block when the gap is small
params.name: block_merge_gap_seconds

params.description: Try to merge short subtitle cues until each speech block is at least this long
params.name: block_min_chars

params.description: Soft upper bound for text length inside one speech block
params.name: block_max_chars

params.description: Try to merge subtitle cues until each speech block lasts at least this long
params.name: block_min_duration_seconds

params.description: Soft upper bound for a single speech block duration
params.name: block_max_duration_seconds

params.description: Maximum atempo speed-up used to prevent overlap when generated speech runs long
params.name: alignment_max_speedup

params.description: Maximum extra delay before a short speech block when there is spare room
params.name: alignment_max_leading_delay_ms

params.description: Use the LLM gateway to shorten long speech blocks before applying speed-up alignment
params.name: alignment_rewrite_with_llm

params.description: Required speed-up ratio that triggers LLM rewrite and re-synthesis
params.name: alignment_rewrite_min_speedup

params.description: Optional model override for TTS alignment rewrite requests
params.name: alignment_rewrite_model
